title: BCSC PVP
description: 追求极致的战斗体验，重新定义 PVP 场景中的视觉交互与操作反馈。Pursue the ultimate combat experience and redefine the visual interaction and operational feedback in PVP scenes.
body:
（这是我闲暇时制作的材质包，也是我的第一个作品，若存在不足之处，恳请谅解。This texture pack was made in my spare time, and it's my first work. Please forgive me if there are any shortcomings.）  
**这款材质包专为《我的世界》（Minecraft）中追求极致 PVP 战斗体验的玩家精心打造，全方位革新战斗场景的视觉呈现与交互感受。**  
**This texture pack is meticulously crafted for players pursuing the ultimate PVP combat experience in Minecraft, revolutionizing the visual presentation and interactive feel of battle scenes in all aspects.** 
1. 为大多数 PVP 常用物品添加了动画效果，希望能为你带来更出色的视觉体验
![已添加的有动画的物品 animated items added](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93350cbdeca876749bab8f4b15113c1af4ec1fd0.png)
Added animation effects to most commonly used PVP items, hoping to bring you a better visual experience
2. 降低了着火时的火焰高度，再也不会因着火而遮挡视线了
![着火时特效的高度 The height of special effects when on fire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66ab07de1820670428dee8de6952276a029d6502.png)
Reduced the height of flames when on fire, so you won't be blocked from view by fire anymore
3. 缩小了手持物品的显示尺寸，避免占用过多视野
![更短的剑和物品 Shorter swords and items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2e57538f21e194a32c3802ce80107c6912170e0.png)
Reduced the display size of held items to avoid taking up too much field of view
4. 新增细雪标识功能，帮助你及时规避细雪区域
Added a fine snow marking function to help you avoid fine snow areas in time
5. 优化了粒子效果，使粒子呈现更美观
Optimized particle effects to make them more visually appealing
6. 对南瓜头进行了优化，佩戴后依然能清晰视物
![使用前 Before use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38e5f7e6704327898d99046c70697548b925799e_0.webp)
![使用后 After use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9ffbc6b1a9fb716e9b8ff36d5b0fa3f5bfbd074.png)
Optimized the pumpkin head, allowing clear vision even when worn
7. 加入 TNT 预警机制：当对手手持 TNT 时，TNT 的显示尺寸会变得极大，助你保护床的安全
![使用后的效果 Effect after use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a565f5b475bc2effcd14096b42840637a9776c75.png)
Added a TNT warning mechanism: when an opponent holds TNT, the display size of TNT will become extremely large, helping you protect the safety of your bed
8. 增加方块描边效果，大多数方块都添加了描边，提升操作手感
Added block outline effects; most blocks have outlines to improve operational feel
9. 采用透明 UI 设计，查看背包时能更清晰地观察周围，减少被偷袭的风险
Adopted a transparent UI design, allowing you to observe the surroundings more clearly when checking the backpack and reducing the risk of being ambushed

无论是紧张刺激的 1v1 单挑，还是混乱激烈的起床战争，BCSC 材质包都能为你带来出色的体验。
Whether it's an intense 1v1 duel or a chaotic bedwars battle, the BCSC texture pack will bring you an excellent experience.
